the world is full of beautiful places, let our heart be one of them ✨this is the beautiful #golestanpalace @visitouriran in #tehran #iran ✨🌅🌸🌺🌿✨#visitouriran 

📍One of the oldest historic monuments in the city of Tehran, & a UNESCO World Heritage Site, 
Rose Garden Palace from Persian language, was built in the 16th century, renovated in the 18th century and finally rebuilt in 1865
